creator: bogorodskiy@gmail.com
text:
I've played a little with that:

http://people.freebsd.org/~novel/misc/zmq_update.diff

Appears that some software doesn't play well with the new zmq, for
example:

http://www.bayofrum.net/tb/errors/9-novel/rubygem-zmq-2.1.4_1.log
http://www.bayofrum.net/tb/errors/9-novel/mongrel2-1.7.5_1.log
http://www.bayofrum.net/tb/errors/9-novel/blastbeat-20121205_2.log

Probably we should move the current version to zmq2 and switch the old
ports to it.

Roman Bogorodskiy
